name: Demi human zoo
description:
Welcome to the biggest Demi human zoo in the world, the Zoologist’s Delight! We have everything from cute bunny Demi humans too big bear demi huma! And so much more

_____

Be any Demi human you like or be a keeper and help take care of the Demi humans or be a guest of the park and watch the Demi human! The possibilities are endless!

Open-ended intro so please feel free to just jump right in!

update 15/1/26: I over worked the npcs, just adding more details :p, please leave any suggestions <3
creator: Ruito905645
